title: YouTube Shorts SEO: Capturing the Micro-Answer Market
excerpt: YouTube Shorts are powerful tools for answering specific user queries. Discover how to optimize short-form video for both human viewers and search algorithms.
author: Corey Spicer
content:
Short-form video is dominating social media, but its impact on search is just beginning to be fully realized. YouTube Shorts often appear at the top of Google search results for "How-to" queries.

Optimizing Shorts for Search

The key to Shorts SEO is the title and the first 3 seconds of audio. Ensure your title exactly matches a high-volume query, and deliver the core answer immediately so retention rates stay high. Answer engines favor high-retention content.
